name: @ont/evidence
description: ONT L3 evidence layer (B3) — non-deciding witness construction + verification. The conformance suite is the contract; a hostile evidence impl cannot move any @ont/consensus verdict.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && vitest run
